startUrls.title: Start URLs (optional)
startUrls.description: List of website URLs to audit directly. If empty, niche + location auto-discovery is used.

niche.title: Niche (for auto-discovery)
niche.description: Business niche to search (e.g. 'plumber', 'dentist', 'restaurant'). Used when no startUrls provided.

location.title: Location (for auto-discovery)
location.description: Location to search in (e.g. 'Chicago', 'Austin TX'). Used when no startUrls provided.

maxSites.title: Maximum Sites to Audit
maxSites.description: Maximum number of websites to audit.

minOpportunityScore.title: Minimum Opportunity Score (0-5)
minOpportunityScore.description: Only include sites with this opportunity score or higher. Set to 0 to include all.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Required for niche auto-discovery via Google.
